🏆 High-Elo Ace Winner Playbook v2

PRESCRIPTIVE Each turn shows DON budget, your life, what you play, what you swing for, what opp plays, what opp swings at you, and what you used to defend. All numbers come from verified replays — no regex guessing, no hallucination.
Sample: 18075 OP15-era ranked replays (from 2026-W12+). Filtered to 1573 games where Ace WON and the Ace player's Elo was ≥ 2400.
1573verified Ace wins
18,075replays scanned
2400+Elo
OP15+W12 2026 onward
